import React from'react';import'./HeatmapDashboard.css';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const HeatmapDashboard=_ref=>{let{language}=_ref;const content={en:{title:'Severity Heatmap Dashboard',totalCases:'Total Cases',highSeverity:'High Severity',patternAlerts:'Pattern Alerts',locations:'Locations',hostel:'Hostels',department:'Departments',campus:'Campus Areas',offCampus:'Off-Campus'},hi:{title:'गंभीरता हीटमैप डैशबोर्ड',totalCases:'कुल मामले',highSeverity:'उच्च गंभीरता',patternAlerts:'पैटर्न अलर्ट',locations:'स्थान',hostel:'छात्रावास',department:'विभाग',campus:'कैंपस क्षेत्र',offCampus:'कैंपस के बाहर'}};const text=content[language]||content.en;// Mock data
const stats={total:45,highSeverity:12,patterns:3};const locations=[{name:text.hostel,count:18,severity:'high'},{name:text.department,count:15,severity:'medium'},{name:text.campus,count:8,severity:'low'},{name:text.offCampus,count:4,severity:'medium'}];return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"heatmap-dashboard",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"dashboard-container",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h1",{children:text.title}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"stats-grid",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"stat-card",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"stat-value",children:stats.total}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"stat-label",children:text.totalCases})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"stat-card high",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"stat-value",children:stats.highSeverity}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"stat-label",children:text.highSeverity})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"stat-card alert",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"stat-value",children:stats.patterns}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"stat-label",children:text.patternAlerts})]})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"heatmap-section",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{children:text.locations}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"heatmap-bars",children:locations.map((loc,i)=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"heatmap-bar",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"bar-label",children:loc.name}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"bar-container",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"bar-fill ".concat(loc.severity),style:{width:"".concat(loc.count/stats.total*100,"%")},children:loc.count})})]},i))})]})]})});};export default HeatmapDashboard;
